nav.background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(71, 54, 33) 0px, rgb(71, 54, 33) 24px, rgb(62, 47, 29) 24px, rgb(62, 47, 29) 48px), none

header.background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 0px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 14px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 14px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 28px), linear-gradient(rgb(71, 111, 49), rgb(52, 84, 36))

hero.background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(139, 104, 64) 0px, rgb(139, 104, 64) 28px, rgb(132, 97, 58) 28px, rgb(132, 97, 58) 56px), linear-gradient(rgb(181, 139, 86), rgb(93, 67, 39))
